extraction.one_line_summary: WOODS Michael attacked Poggio Morello summit with 5.8km remaining, dropped MICKA on final kick after 2-rider breakaway cooperation
tactical_patterns: Woods delayed final acceleration until inside 6km despite holding gap, forcing Micka into false cooperation expecting group return.
Kelderman led chase group sprint at 20sec suggesting EF calculated bonus seconds plus time gap worth more than unity.
Chase group hesitation with 13sec gap at 5.8km reveals GC contenders prioritize avoiding losses over preventing Woods escape.

rider_signals.WOODS Michael: positive: recognized stage profile pre-race as personal opportunity, then executed solo tactical plan without team needing to control
rider_signals.MICKA Rafal: negative: ambushed by Woods acceleration despite being in 2-man move, suggesting inferior finish speed to climbing peers
rider_signals.KELDERMAN Wilco: positive: led chase sprint rather than bridging gap, indicating Sunweb comfort with small time losses on wavy stages
rider_signals.THOMAS Geraint: neutral: described as 'reborn' on Poggio Morello climb but finished 30sec down, suggesting form improving but incomplete
rider_signals.DUNBAR Eddie: negative: explicitly noted as suffering on steepest hill while teammates animated, reveals current condition deficit
rider_signals.NIBALI Vincenzo: negative: 43sec deficit requires work to recover, unexpected weakness on Tuscan terrain he historically dominates
